---
title: "S1_Analysis"
author: "Suryadyuti Baral"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
# Define all conditions and metrics
conditions <- c("normal_m4", "normal_m10", "normal_m100", 
                "replicate_m4", "replicate_m10", "replicate_m100")
metrics <- c("ie_opt", "ise_opt", "bias_opt", "mse_opt", "ie_all", "ise_all", "bias_all", "mse_all")

# Initialize an empty list to hold each metric x condition vector
metric_matrix_list <- list()

# Loop over each condition and extract metric vectors
for (metric in metrics) {
  metric_vecs <- sapply(conditions, function(cond) {
    sapply(result_tbl[[cond]], function(x) x[[metric]])
  })
  metric_matrix_list[[metric]] <- metric_vecs
}

metric_matrix_df <- lapply(metric_matrix_list, as.data.frame)
```

```{r}
# Define display order for metrics and labels
opt_metrics <- c("mse_opt", "bias_opt", "ise_opt", "ie_opt")
all_metrics <- c("mse_all", "bias_all", "ise_all", "ie_all")
metric_order <- c(opt_metrics, all_metrics)

# Create empty matrix to store results
summary_tbl <- matrix(NA, nrow = 6, ncol = 8)

# Fill in rows by group: normal (1:3), replicate (4:6)
row_labels <- rep(c("4", "10", "100"), times = 2)
group_labels <- rep(c("normal", "replicate"), each = 3)

# Loop through each metric and condition to compute mean (sd)
for (j in seq_along(metric_order)) {
  metric <- metric_order[j]
  mat <- metric_matrix_df[[metric]]
  
  for (i in 1:6) {
    mean_val <- mean(mat[, i], na.rm = TRUE)
    sd_val <- sd(mat[, i], na.rm = TRUE)
    summary_tbl[i, j] <- sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)", mean_val, sd_val)
  }
}

# Convert to data frame and add row labels
summary_tbl_df <- as.data.frame(summary_tbl)
colnames(summary_tbl_df) <- c(paste("opt", c("mse", "bias", "ise", "ie"), sep = "_"),
                              paste("all", c("mse", "bias", "ise", "ie"), sep = "_"))
summary_tbl_df <- cbind(group = group_labels, level = row_labels, summary_tbl_df)

```
```{r}
library(flextable)
library(dplyr)

colnames(summary_tbl_df) <- c("Group", "Level",
                              rep(c("MSE", "Bias", "ISE", "IE"), times = 2))
names(summary_tbl_df)[3:6] <- paste0("Opt_", names(summary_tbl_df)[3:6])
names(summary_tbl_df)[7:10] <- paste0("All_", names(summary_tbl_df)[7:10])

# Create APA-style flextable
apa_flex <- flextable(summary_tbl_df) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Group = "Condition",
    Level = "Level",
    Opt_MSE = "MSE", Opt_Bias = "Bias", Opt_ISE = "ISE", Opt_IE = "IE",
    All_MSE = "MSE", All_Bias = "Bias", All_ISE = "ISE", All_IE = "IE"
  ) %>%
  add_header_row(values = c("", "", "Opt Metrics", "All Metrics"),
                 colwidths = c(1, 1, 4, 4)) %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fontsize(size = 11, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  padding(padding = 4, part = "all")

apa_flex

```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Define mapping from row indices to condition + level
condition_info <- tibble(
  Condition = rep(c("Normal", "Replicate"), each = 3),
  Level = rep(c("4", "10", "100"), times = 2)
)

# Extract raw values for ie_opt and ise_opt
ie_data <- as_tibble(metric_matrix_df$ie_opt) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "ConditionLevel", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(ConditionLevel = factor(ConditionLevel, levels = names(metric_matrix_df$ie_opt))) %>%
  mutate(Row = row_number() %% 6 + 1) %>%
  bind_cols(condition_info[rep(1:6, times = nrow(.) / 6), ]) %>%
  mutate(Metric = "IE")

ise_data <- as_tibble(metric_matrix_df$ise_opt) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "ConditionLevel", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(ConditionLevel = factor(ConditionLevel, levels = names(metric_matrix_df$ise_opt))) %>%
  mutate(Row = row_number() %% 6 + 1) %>%
  bind_cols(condition_info[rep(1:6, times = nrow(.) / 6), ]) %>%
  mutate(Metric = "ISE")

mse_data <- as_tibble(metric_matrix_df$mse_opt) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "ConditionLevel", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(ConditionLevel = factor(ConditionLevel, levels = names(metric_matrix_df$mse_opt))) %>%
  mutate(Row = row_number() %% 6 + 1) %>%
  bind_cols(condition_info[rep(1:6, times = nrow(.) / 6), ]) %>%
  mutate(Metric = "MSE")

bias_data <- as_tibble(metric_matrix_df$bias_opt) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "ConditionLevel", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(ConditionLevel = factor(ConditionLevel, levels = names(metric_matrix_df$bias_opt))) %>%
  mutate(Row = row_number() %% 6 + 1) %>%
  bind_cols(condition_info[rep(1:6, times = nrow(.) / 6), ]) %>%
  mutate(Metric = "Bias")

# Combine into one long dataframe
metrics_long <- bind_rows(ie_data, ise_data, mse_data, bias_data)


plot_opt_metric <- function(metric_name) {
  df_sub <- metrics_long %>% filter(Metric == metric_name)
  
  ggplot(df_sub, aes(x = Level, y = Value)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, fill = "lightblue") +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 1.8, alpha = 0.5) +
    facet_wrap(~Condition) +
    labs(title = paste(metric_name, "(Opt Metric)"),
         x = "Level", y = metric_name) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
}

# Generate plots
plot_ise <- plot_opt_metric("ISE")
plot_ie <- plot_opt_metric("IE")
plot_mse <- plot_opt_metric("MSE")
plot_bias <- plot_opt_metric("Bias")

# Display
plot_ise
plot_ie
plot_mse
plot_bias

```
